text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the start of summer camp, where the
Umamusume train to improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Or at least, it should be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But Symboli Rudolf still hasn't left the academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon and Fuji Kiseki. Your status reports,
if you please.
choice_data_list:
(If I recall correctly... they're the Miho and Ritto
dorm leaders.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The Miho Dorm folks are all accounted for. They
were on the bus that just departed.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All of the Ritto Dormitory residents have left as
well. Aside from one who reported being sick this
morning.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. I trust the unwell student is receiving
appropriate treatment?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I've left her in the faculty's care.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Then we are all set. Thank you both for your hard
work. You may join the rest of the students.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Got it. Don't be late now, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer. I'm sorry to have kept you
waiting.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Once we finish our final checks, we can depart
ourselves.
choice_data_list: Not leading from the front today?
Not leading from the front today?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I believe Air Groove has that well in hand.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And besides, I want to check in on the student
who had to stay behind.
choice_data_list: But what if you miss the start of camp?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I have a plan to avoid that. Incidentally...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Do the words "Hot Rod" sound familiar to you?
choice_data_list: (I have a bad feeling about this...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And that feeling was dead on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VROOOOOM! Screeeeech!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for driving us, Maruzensky. If not for
you, we wouldn't have made it in time.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
No sweat! I'm always up to take my baby out for a
spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's "plan" turned out to be asking
Maruzensky to drive us to the campsite in her
prized sports car.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Maruzensky has a bit of a
reputation for being a wild driver... A reputation
that's well deserved.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Say, Rudolf?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer's looking a little pale. Is everything
good?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I imagine your driving often leaves
people too amazed to speak.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that right, Trainer? Aren't Maruzensky's skills
in a league of their own?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you'd like, I could also ask her to drive us back
as w—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Speed bumps aside, summer camp finally begins.
